title: Record a TUI tool-duration transparency contract
prompt: Create reports/tui-duration-transparency-contract.md with sections for Live duration chips, Finished duration chips, Thinking glance, and Keyboard expand path.

fixtureActions.content:
# TUI Duration Transparency Contract

## Live duration chips
unfinished tools show elapsed time when streamingStartedAtMs is known (sub-second quiet)

## Finished duration chips
finished tool headers append duration with result chips

## Thinking glance
live thinking shows a 3-line tail without expand

## Keyboard expand path
ctrl+o expands full thinking/tool history
